name: Kneat.com, Inc.
description: Kneat.com, Inc. is a software company headquartered in Limerick, Ireland, that specializes in the development and marketing of the Kneat Gx platform. This software-as-a-service (SaaS) solution is designed to meet the stringent regulatory requirements of the pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device industries. The platform facilitates digital validation, equipment changeover management, and risk lifecycle management, enabling organizations to transition from paper-based processes to efficient, compliant digital workflows. By providing a robust, cloud-based environment, Kneat helps companies improve data integrity, accelerate time-to-market, and ensure continuous compliance within highly regulated global manufacturing and laboratory environments.
